briefdescription.para: Construct a GeometryShop that owns an implicit function f.

parameterdescription.para: Implicit function whose sign distinguishes inside/outside.

briefdescription.para: Construct a GeometryShop with an implicit function and resource handle.

parameterdescription.para: Auxiliary resource (e.g., Parser data) kept alive while f is in use.

briefdescription.para: Immutable access to the underlying implicit function.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Box &bx, const Geometry &geom, RunOn run_on) const noexcept
memberdef.name: getBoxType

briefdescription.para: Classify bx as regular, covered, or mixed (GPU-capable case).

parameterdescription.para: Whether to run on CPU or GPU.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Box &bx, const Geometry &geom, RunOn) const noexcept
memberdef.name: getBoxType

memberdef.argsstring: (BaseFab< Real > &levelset, const Geometry &geom, RunOn run_on, Box const &bounding_box) const noexcept
memberdef.name: fillFab

briefdescription.para: Fill a level-set FAB by sampling the implicit function on each point in the FAB.

parameterdescription.para: Bounding box limiting the sampling region.

memberdef.argsstring: (BaseFab< Real > &levelset, const Geometry &geom, RunOn, Box const &bounding_box) const noexcept
memberdef.name: fillFab

memberdef.argsstring: (BaseFab< Real > &levelset, const Geometry &geom, Box const &bounding_box) const noexcept
memberdef.name: fillFab_Cpu

memberdef.argsstring: (Array< Array4< Real >, 3 > const &inter_arr, Array< Array4< Type_t const >, 3 > const &type_arr, Array4< Real const > const &, Geometry const &geom, RunOn run_on, Box const &bounding_box) const noexcept
memberdef.name: getIntercept

briefdescription.para: Compute EB intercepts for irregular edges (GPU-capable case).

parameterdescription.para: Array of intercept FABs per direction.

memberdef.argsstring: (Array< Array4< Real >, 3 > const &inter_arr, Array< Array4< Type_t const >, 3 > const &type_arr, Array4< Real const > const &, Geometry const &geom, RunOn, Box const &bounding_box) const noexcept
memberdef.name: getIntercept

memberdef.argsstring: (Array4< Real > const &inter, Array4< Type_t const > const &type, Geometry const &geom, Box const &bounding_box, const int idim) const noexcept
memberdef.name: getIntercept_Cpu

memberdef.argsstring: (Array< Array4< Real >, 3 > const &inter_arr, Array< Array4< Type_t const >, 3 > const &type_arr, Array4< Real const > const &lst, Geometry const &geom) const noexcept
memberdef.name: updateIntercept

briefdescription.para: Update intercepts when level-set data has been adjusted (e.g., fixing small cells).

parameterdescription.para: Array of intercept FABs per direction.
Level-set data used to determine zero crossings.

memberdef.definition: static constexpr bool amrex::EB2::GeometryShop< F, R >::isGPUable
memberdef.name: isGPUable

memberdef.definition: static constexpr bool amrex::EB2::GeometryShop< F, R >::isGPUable
memberdef.name: isGPUable

briefdescription.para: Samples an implicit function on boxes and fills EB data.

parameterdescription.para: Functor providing the implicit function value.
Optional resource handle kept alive as long as the shop exists.
